reviews.review_description: Lagging hard on my Samsung S7, huge fps loss

reviews.review_title: Won't download anymore. Oculus fix it
reviews.review_description:
I have 166 games and this 1 of about 40 I can no longer download. Still happy to sell them though.

Oculus, get your act together!  Other games with same issue are:

Gunjack

Anshar 2

Gunsight

Dark Days Narratie escape room

Adventures of ice cream

VYCM

Ghosts in a toy box

Temple run

Lamper VR firefly rescue

ZED shot

Mr cat's adventure

The purge day

Hidden temple vr adventure

Prison vr

Romans 360

Faceted Flight

Space maze

Combat vr

Vaptain 13

Shooting showdown 2

The hunter

Zombie fun

Magic smash

A Lunar adventure

Soul Dimension

Pupil

Castaways vr

Krypt Crawler

Micromachines VR Racing

Duckpocalypse

Turkey Hunt

Balloon Shooter VR

Bee Invasion 3D

Needs a cockpit view, needs a control scheme that can be decoupled from head movements, and needs better music in the lobby.  As it is stands right now this is a play for a few minutes then uninstall and forget title for any veteran Gear VR user.

In fact fundamentally it's just an endless runner, and if you weren't flying through hoops you'd be running through coins.

I bought this thinking it was the same as the version for the regular oculus minus of course the head tracking.  That version is incredibly fun to play and fly upside down etc even if I did make myself nauseous occasionally. 

So I am disappointed in this neutered version.   I feel that the changes for the gear vr should have been made clearer to me before purchasing.

developer_response.body:
Hi Xeones, 

I'm sorry to hear you're frustrated. You're right, they are two very different games: there is Faceted Flight: Canyon Runner (Gear VR) and Faceted Flight (Rift). Though the screenshots show they're different games, the "box art" I'm using is very similar, and I'll fix that. Sorry for the confusion. 

Some Faceted Flight History if you're interested - About 6 months into development of Faceted Flight for the Rift, I was given an opportunity to make a Gear VR game for the Note 4. I paused development on the Rift game and spent a lot of time hacking away at FF to get it running on the Note4. I never found a satisfactory balance between perf, gameplay, and ergonomics so instead of a port I decided to make a simpler, more arcade-y, game specifically for Mobile VR. And that's how Faceted Flight: Canyon Runner came about. After the release of FF:CR, I focused my efforts back onto Faceted Flight for the Rift.

Thanks for playing!
-Matt

reviews.review_description: Good concept but levels are repetitive with little excitement. First person view would be nice and much faster game play.
The sound is wrong how can i fix it?
